name: Fathom
one_liner: AI meeting notetaker that records, transcribes, and summarizes calls; its public REST API exposes meeting summaries, transcripts, action items, and webhooks for agent workflows.
access_notes: Users self-generate an API key from User Settings > API Access (fathom.video/customize#api-access) with no approval or app review. Keys are user-scoped and only access the owner's own or shared/team meetings. Fathom has a free account tier; API key generation is self-serve. Plan-tier gating of API access is not explicitly documented, so free-tier eligibility is somewhat uncertain (the official remote MCP server is stated to be paid-only). Rate limit is 60 calls/min across a user's keys.
api_notes: REST API under /external/v1. Documented endpoints: list meeting types, list meetings (with include_transcript/include_summary/include_action_items/include_crm_matches/include_highlights and cursor pagination), get recording summary, get recording transcript, list team members, list teams, create webhook, delete webhook. TypeScript and Python SDKs referenced. A handful of read-focused endpoints plus webhook management.
mcp_notes: Fathom ships an official remote MCP server at https://api.fathom.ai/mcp (documented at developers.fathom.ai/mcp-docs and help.fathom.video), connecting Fathom meeting data to Claude/ChatGPT and other MCP clients. Reported to be paid-plan-only. Several community/unofficial MCP servers also exist (matthewbergvinson, trevorwelch, lukas-bekr on GitHub).
main_blocker: None significant for the REST API: self-serve API key, no approval. Minor caveat is uncertainty over whether API access is limited to certain plan tiers, and the official MCP server appears paid-only.

evidence.claim: Fathom offers a public REST API with user-generated API keys (X-Api-Key header), endpoints /external/v1/meetings and /recordings/{id}/transcript, cursor pagination, 60 calls/min limit.
API index lists meetings, recordings (summary/transcript), teams/team members, and webhook create/delete endpoints, including a 'New meeting content ready' webhook payload.
Fathom offers an official MCP server at api.fathom.ai/mcp to connect meeting data to AI assistants.
Public API help article: API keys are created at the user level; directs to the developer Quickstart.
Help article on connecting Fathom MCP to Claude & ChatGPT.

open_questions: Whether the REST API requires a paid Fathom plan or is available on the free tier is not explicitly documented. The official MCP server is reported paid-only; exact plan requirement for both API and MCP is unconfirmed.
